title: schizoglossum bidens subsp. atrorubens
intro: Schizoglossum bidens subsp. atrorubens is a rare and lesser-known species of the Schizoglossum genus, belonging to the Apocynaceae family of plants. It is a succulent plant that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Schizoglossum bidens subsp. atrorubens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing and the treatment of skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
